ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year range */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Year range (e.g., 1945-1949) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the range */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year range data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclear_stockpiles" (
  "stockpile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuclear stockpile entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "warheads" INTEGER /* Number of nuclear warheads */,
  "warhead_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warhead type */,
  "delivery_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery system */,
  "warheads_decommissioned" INTEGER /* Number of warheads decommissioned */,
  "warheads_deployed" INTEGER /* Number of warheads deployed */,
  "warheads_in_storage" INTEGER /* Number of warheads in storage */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stockpile data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stockpile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_stockpiles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_stockpiles_delivery_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_system_id") REFERENCES delivery_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_stockpiles_warhead_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("warhead_type_id") REFERENCES warhead_types ("warhead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_stockpiles_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warhead_types" (
  "warhead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warhead type */,
  "warhead_name" TEXT /* Name of the warhead type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warhead type */,
  "payload_capacity" INTEGER /* Payload capacity of the warhead in kilograms */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the warhead in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the warhead type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warhead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery system */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., Bomber, Submarine) */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the delivery system in kilometers */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the delivery system in kilometers per hour */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the delivery system data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analyst's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stockpile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nuclear stockpile entry being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the analyst's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the analyst's access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stockpile_id FOREIGN KEY ("stockpile_id") REFERENCES nuclear_stockpiles ("stockpile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "warhead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warhead type */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_warhead_id FOREIGN KEY ("warhead_id") REFERENCES warhead_types ("warhead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
